354

MUED - Music Education

MUED215 Woodwind Technique and Pedagogy (2 Credits) Playing experience on instruments of the woodwind family. Historical and acoustical background. Basic concepts of teaching. Methods and materials. Techniques of individual and class instruction. Restriction: Permission of ARHU-School of Music department.

MUED216 Percussion Technique and Pedagogy (2 Credits) Playing experience on percussion instruments. Historical and acoustical background. Scoring for percussion. Principles of improvisation. Basic concepts of teaching. Methods and materials. Techniques of individual and class instruction. Restriction: Must be in Music Education program.

MUED217 Brass Instrument Technique and Pedagogy (2 Credits) Playing experience on instruments of the brass family. Historical and acoustical background. Principles of improvisation. Basic concepts of teaching. Methods and materials. Techniques of individual and class instruction. Restriction: Must be in Music Education program.

MUED269 Special Topics in Study Abroad II (1-6 Credits) Special topics course taken as part of an approved study abroad program. Repeatable to: 15 credits if content differs.
